name: construction accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For construction accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes budget overruns. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate reconciliation of subcontractor invoices with project budgets.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of subcontractor invoices with project budgets.
